name: Lilia
description:
Lilia is a maid of the Greyrat household. She was [Paul](https://anilist.co/character/88347/Paul-Greyrat)'s classmate in a swordsman dojo. A crippling injury forces her to leave her position as a princess guard, and she becomes a maid to Paul and [Zenith](https://anilist.co/character/179855/Zenith-Greyrat).

~!After working through the revelation with the family, she is taken in as Paul's second wife and becomes closer friends with Zenith. Lillia gets pregnant with Paul's daughter and becomes the mother of [Aisha Greyrat](https://anilist.co/character/145459/Aisha-Greyrat)!~
